3195450.name: Crony Corp
3195450.description:
Step into the cutthroat world of Crony Corp, where building factories is only the beginning.

Build Factories, craft goods, upgrade your operations, and manipulate a live market shaped by every player’s choices. Whether you’re climbing the ladder or pulling it out from under someone else, it’s all part of the game. Sabotage rivals, exploit loopholes, and make your mark — just don’t expect to play fair.

  • You're the Boss: Control every decision and grow your business empire.

  • Crafting & Building: Upgrade factories, craft hundreds of products, and outplay your competitors.

  • Live Economy: The market shifts with your actions—trade smart and dominate.

  • PvP Mode: Undercut, disrupt, and outmaneuver your rivals in a world where sabotage is just another business strategy.

Your success depends on making money, and lots of it. You’ll upgrade factories, purchase new ones, and craft hundreds of products in a vast product tree that allows for endless gameplay strategies.

  • Upgrade everything: Factories, products, and your reputation as the boss everyone loves to hate.

  • Craft and compete: Choose your industry, maximize your profits, and prove you’ve got the business chops to beat out your rivals.

  • Espionage on the side: Sabotage is just another tool in the corporate toolbox. Use it wisely.

Crony Corp features a live economy where the market is constantly shifting. Your choices directly impact the price of goods, so keep an eye on those supply and demand curves, and react fast to market changes.

  • Global marketplace: Hundreds of products to trade in real-time, all impacted by your decisions.

  • Dynamic prices: Your actions influence the entire economy, making you a true market player.

  • Seize opportunities: Stay sharp and exploit every market fluctuation to ensure your profits soar.

In Crony Corp, the market isn't your only enemy. Other players are out to ruin you, too. In PvP Mode, sabotage is just another tool in your business arsenal. Outsmart, disrupt, and retaliate as you climb the corporate ladder by any means necessary.

  • Disrupt rival operations: Interfere with production lines, trigger delays, and cause chaos when it hurts most.

  • Target key personnel: Cripple Managerial performance with… unfortunate mishaps.

Play dirty, rise fast. Sabotage isn’t just allowed, it’s a core part of your strategy.

After all, it’s not personal. It’s just business. Mostly.
